one_time_description: ISC Health Centre of Excellence capital contribution $38,278,954 and ISC COVID domes capital contribution $2,231,715 - large non-recurring capital transfers
economic_notes: Entity operates VLT gaming, pharmacy, broadband, construction (PDC), motel (York Boat Inn), restaurant (York Boat Diner), fishing lodge (Molson Lake Lodge), radio bingo (Muchipunowin), and holds GBE interests in Bison Container Homes (modular homes), Kici Sipi Communications (broadband infrastructure), and Tower Camp (remote accommodations). First Nations Finance Authority loan secured against non-government transfer revenue.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Large non-recurring capital contributions from ISC for Health Centre of Excellence ($38.3M) and COVID domes ($2.2M) significantly inflate surplus. Entity has complex consolidation with 18 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 3 GBEs under modified equity method. Net debt position of $59.8M. Significant allowance for doubtful accounts of $10.66M against receivables. First Nations Finance Authority loan of $10.5M taken out during the year. Deferred revenue increased substantially by $15M during the year. expenses_health combines Health Services ($14,514,852), Health Centre of Excellence ($4,325,805); expenses_housing combines Housing ($7,646,650) and CMHC ($3,270,013); no schedule of remuneration included in extracted text.
